requirement_topic.en: EDC Grid Connection — 230/400 V / 50 Hz and EAC Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: EDC并网接入——230/400 V / 50 Hz及EAC协调
requirement_topic.zht: EDC併網接入——230/400 V / 50 Hz及EAC協調

summary.en: Cambodia operates on 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz, supplied primarily by Electricité du Cambodge (EDC), the state-owned utility. Grid-connected EV charger installations must comply with EDC connection procedures, including load notification, metering requirements, and installation approval by a licensed electrical contractor. The Electricity Authority of Cambodia (EAC) is the national electricity regulator under the Ministry of Mines and Energy, responsible for licensing electricity operators, approving tariffs, and overseeing grid safety. EAC coordinates the regulatory framework within which EDC and private distribution licensees operate. For public EV charging infrastructure, project owners and operators are expected to engage EAC and EDC for grid-connection approval, metering, and compliance with Cambodia's electricity law. ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) adopts IEC standards and power-quality requirements aligned with IEC 61000.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz电网，主要由国有电力公司EDC（柬埔寨国家电力公司）供电。并网充电桩安装须符合EDC连接程序，包括负荷申报、计量要求，以及由持照电气承包商进行的安装审批。柬埔寨电力管理局（EAC）是隶属矿业与能源部的国家电力监管机构，负责电力运营商许可、电价审批和电网安全监督。EAC协调EDC和私营配电许可证持有人的监管框架。对于公共电动汽车充电基础设施，项目业主和运营商须向EAC和EDC申请并网审批、计量安排及柬埔寨电力法合规。ISC（柬埔寨标准研究院）采纳IEC标准，电能质量要求与IEC 61000系列一致。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz電網，主要由國有電力公司EDC（柬埔寨國家電力公司）供電。併網充電樁安裝須符合EDC連接程序，包括負荷申報、計量要求，以及由持照電氣承包商進行的安裝審批。柬埔寨電力管理局（EAC）是隸屬礦業與能源部的國家電力監管機構，負責電力運營商許可、電價審批和電網安全監督。EAC協調EDC和私營配電許可證持有人的監管框架。對於公共電動汽車充電基礎設施，項目業主和運營商須向EAC和EDC申請併網審批、計量安排及柬埔寨電力法合規。ISC（柬埔寨標準研究院）採納IEC標準，電能質量要求與IEC 61000系列一致。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Law of the Kingdom of Cambodia (EAC licensing framework)
EDC (Electricité du Cambodge) grid-connection and metering requirements
EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) electricity operator licensing regulations
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality limits
ISC (Institute of Standards of Cambodia) adopted IEC standards

summary.en: China domestic charger installations operate under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Cambodia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply is close to China's baseline but requires confirmation of input-voltage range, power electronics ratings, and thermal derating for Cambodia's tropical ambient temperatures (typically 25–38 °C year-round). China domestic grid-operator acceptance is not a substitute for EDC connection approval or EAC licensing in Cambodia.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz供电与中国基线相近，但须确认输入电压范围、电力电子额定值，以及柬埔寨热带环境温度（全年通常25–38°C）下的热降额。中国国内电网运营商验收不能替代柬埔寨的EDC并网审批或EAC许可。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz供電與中國基線相近，但須確認輸入電壓範圍、電力電子額定值，以及柬埔寨熱帶環境溫度（全年通常25–38°C）下的熱降額。中國國內電網運營商驗收不能替代柬埔寨的EDC併網審批或EAC許可。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) thermal design and derating are validated for Cambodia's tropical ambient temperatures (up to 38 °C sustained, with high humidity); (3) EDC grid-connection approval and metering arrangement are obtained for the installation site; (4) EAC licensing obligations are met for the charge-point operator; (5) installation is performed by a licensed electrical contractor under Cambodia's electricity regulatory framework; (6) harmonic and power-quality data are prepared per IEC 61000. China domestic 220/380 V design evidence does not constitute EDC or EAC approval for Cambodia installations.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 输入电压范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 热设计和降额已针对柬埔寨热带环境温度（持续最高38°C，高湿度）进行验证；(3) 已取得安装场地的EDC并网审批和计量安排；(4) 充电点运营商已满足EAC许可义务；(5) 安装由柬埔寨电力监管框架下的持照电气承包商进行；(6) 已按IEC 61000准备谐波和电能质量数据。中国国内220/380 V设计证据不构成柬埔寨安装的EDC或EAC审批。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 輸入電壓範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 熱設計和降額已針對柬埔寨熱帶環境溫度（持續最高38°C，高濕度）進行驗證；(3) 已取得安裝場地的EDC併網審批和計量安排；(4) 充電點運營商已滿足EAC許可義務；(5) 安裝由柬埔寨電力監管框架下的持照電氣承包商進行；(6) 已按IEC 61000準備諧波和電能質量數據。中國國內220/380 V設計證據不構成柬埔寨安裝的EDC或EAC審批。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EDC grid-connection approval and EAC licensing framework apply to EV charger installations in Cambodia; confirm current EDC connection procedures and EAC operator licensing requirements with EDC and EAC directly
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically; it is not a substitute for EDC grid-connection approval or EAC licensing in Cambodia; voltage and thermal ratings must be confirmed for Cambodia conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid is close to China's domestic baseline but EDC grid-connection approval and EAC regulatory coordination are required for EV charger installations. Confirm input-voltage range, tropical thermal derating, EDC metering, and EAC licensing before installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz电网与中国国内基线相近，但电动汽车充电桩安装须取得EDC并网审批和EAC监管协调。安装前须确认输入电压范围、热带环境热降额、EDC计量及EAC许可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨230/400 V、50 Hz電網與中國國內基線相近，但電動汽車充電樁安裝須取得EDC併網審批和EAC監管協調。安裝前須確認輸入電壓範圍、熱帶環境熱降額、EDC計量及EAC許可。
